title: The Clocktower Masquerade
hook: A masked charity gala turns deadly when the host is found dead moments before the midnight unveiling of a historic town clock
police_summary:
A masked charity gala turns deadly when the host is found dead moments before the midnight unveiling of a historic town clock.

Victim: Julian Vale, the wealthy patron funding the restoration of the old clocktower and the public face of the heritage project.
Setting: A grand municipal hall connected to an old clocktower, with a private gallery, a backstage dressing corridor, and a locked maintenance stairwell leading up to the clock mechanism.

initial_open_questions: Julian discovered that Clara had knowingly protected a forged artifact to preserve the restoration project.
Marcus secretly helped Clara reach the maintenance stairwell because he believed she only wanted to plead with Julian.
The public timeline does not fully align with: Julian is found dead near the base of the clock mechanism after the guests are held in the main hall.

archive_domains.label: Crime Scene Packet
archive_domains.summary: Primary incident records and early observations.

location_dossiers.label: Primary Scene
location_dossiers.summary: A grand municipal hall connected to an old clocktower, with a private gallery, a backstage dressing corridor, and a locked maintenance stairwell leading up to the clock mechanism.

valid_board_links.notes: One hidden thread tied to Folded Card from the Gala Floor may unlock more of the case.
Clara Whitmore has a motive thread tied to Folded Card from the Gala Floor.
